docs:
# Perspective Grid
A receding floor grid for tech and SaaS hero sections.
## Import
```tsx
import { PerspectiveGrid } from "@/components/ui/perspective-grid";
```
## Usage
```tsx
"use client";


<PerspectiveGrid color="#a855f7" speed={1} fade colorFrom={undefined} colorTo={undefined} speed={1} />
```
## Props
- **color** (string) — default: `"#a855f7"`: Color
- **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed
- **fade** (boolean) — default: `true`: Fade mask
- **colorFrom** (string): From
- **colorTo** (string): To
- **speed** (number) — default: `1`: Speed
> Requires `"use client"` in the file that renders this component.
Some Aurora UI components use custom Tailwind animations (animate-shimmer, animate-marquee, animate-aurora, etc.). Merge keyframes from https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Rydaguy101/aurora-ui/main/tailwind.config.ts into your tailwind.config.
## Install
```bash
npx --yes github:Rydaguy101/aurora-ui add perspective-grid
# or with shadcn CLI (after aurora-ui init):
npx shadcn@latest add @aurora/perspective-grid
```
